articles.title: Gibson, Dean knock over NZ for 80 as England cruise to series win
articles.description: England closed out the chase in the decider with seven wickets and 37 balls to spare

articles.title: Sri Lanka name Kusal Mendis as ODI and T20I captain for WI tour
articles.description: Wanindu Hasaranga is set to return to action in ODIs and T20Is since tearing his hamstring early in the T20 World Cup in February

articles.title: Solid RCB, surging GT clash for direct final ticket
articles.description: They have an even 4-4 head-to-head record, but GT will be playing their first ever game in Dharamsala

articles.title: Australia women's coach Shelley Nitschke signs three-year contract extension
articles.description: Will remain in her role until June 2029 during a time when more change is likely

articles.title: Devine intervention brings New Zealand back from the dead
articles.description: Pitch-perfect 87 from veteran rescues team from turmoil at 11 for 4, to square series

articles.title: Ireland pick four uncapped players for New Zealand Test
articles.description: The 14-member squad includes Jake Egan, Tom Mayes, Liam McCarthy and Reuben Wilson

articles.title: Babar back for ODIs vs Australia; uncapped Rohail, Minhas and Daniyal called up
articles.description: Shadab Khan and Naseem Shah also returned for three-match series, while Mohammad Rizwan was omitted

articles.title: Bangladesh to tour Zimbabwe for all-format series in June-July
articles.description: Upcoming series will mark Zimbabwe's first home assignment this year, and their first international action since the T20 World Cup

articles.title: Exiled Afghanistan women to tour England during T20 World Cup
articles.description: Afghan Refugee Women's Team will start their tour on June 22

articles.title: Gaby Lewis to lead Ireland at T20 World Cup
articles.description: Orla Prendergast, the vice-captain for the T20 World Cup, will lead Ireland in a tri-series against Pakistan and West Indies before the big tournament as Gaby Lewis recovers from a leg injury

articles.title: Murugan Ashwin calls time on IPL and domestic career
articles.description: Murugan played 44 IPL matches.

articles.title: India Women’s team captain Harmanpreet Kaur honoured with Padma Shri award
articles.description: Harmanpreet Kaur led India Women to their historic Women’s World Cup 2025 triumph after defeating South Africa in the final.

articles.title: 'I want to score 200 in T20 match' - Vaibhav Sooryavanshi sets aspirational goal to break Chris Gayle's 175* record
articles.description: Gayle made 175* off 66 balls against Pune Warriors in 2013 at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium, which is still the record for the highest individual score in T20 cricket.

articles.title: Andrew McDonald backs pace trio to feature in 2027 ODI World Cup
articles.description: Pat Cummins, Josh Hazlewood and Mitchell Starc have not been named in Australia’s tour of Pakistan, set to commence on May 30.
